rbwCommand.label: rbw command
rbwCommand.description: Executable to run, for example `rbw` or an absolute path.

profile.label: Profile
profile.description: Optional RBW_PROFILE name. Leave empty to use rbw's default profile.

email.label: Email
email.description: Bitwarden account email for rbw login. Leave empty to keep the current rbw setting.

baseUrl.label: Base URL
baseUrl.description: Bitwarden API endpoint. Use this for self-hosted Bitwarden or Vaultwarden.

identityUrl.label: Identity URL
identityUrl.description: Optional identity endpoint. Usually empty unless your server uses a custom identity URL.

autoApplyConfig.label: Apply rbw config on use
autoApplyConfig.description: Before launcher actions, write the non-empty endpoint and account settings to rbw.

includeInSearch.label: Include in main search
includeInSearch.description: When enabled, Bitwarden results can appear outside the >bw command after the vault has been loaded.

copyField.label: Default copied field
copyField.description: Field copied when the All tab is selected. Common values: password, username, totp, notes.

maxResults.label: Max results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of vault entries shown in the launcher.

lockTimeout.label: Lock timeout
lockTimeout.description: Seconds rbw keeps keys in memory. Leave empty to keep the current rbw setting.

syncInterval.label: Sync interval
syncInterval.description: Seconds between rbw background syncs. Use 0 to disable rbw's automatic sync.

pinentry.label: Pinentry command
pinentry.description: Program rbw uses for password prompts, for example `pinentry-qt`.

launcher.title: Bitwarden
launcher.description: Search Bitwarden vault entries through rbw

checking.title: Checking Bitwarden lock state...
checking.description: This does not prompt for your master password.

initial.title: Load Bitwarden entries
initial.description: Runs rbw only now, so Noctalia startup does not unlock your vault.

error.title: Bitwarden unavailable
error.description: Check rbw, profile, endpoint, and pinentry settings.

unlock.title: Unlock Bitwarden
unlock.description: Close the launcher and show the rbw password prompt

sync.title: Sync Bitwarden vault
sync.description: Run rbw sync for the configured profile

lock.title: Lock Bitwarden vault
lock.description: Run rbw lock for the configured profile
